claim_boundary: Milestone receipts and diagnostics are this run's own gate values and artifacts; each row carries only its named scope. This file contains only quantities computed from this run's data. Shared-record gauge agreement compares observer views of one committed record; it does not certify independent per-observer commit histories or a strict neutral third-person bulk. Paper-side public-data comparisons live in docs/OPH_SIGNATURE_EXPERIMENT_TRACKER.md (section 0a) and docs/BEST_OF_PUBLIC_DATA_COMPARISONS.md, never in run artifacts.
